title: The Scheduled Areas (Assimilation of Laws) Act, 1951
full_text: The Scheduled Areas (Assimilation of Laws) Act, 1951 अनुसूचित क्षेत्र (विधियों की एकरूपता) अधिनियम, 1951 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1951-37 Act Number: 37 Enactment Date: 1951-06-23 Act Year: 1951 Short Title: The Scheduled Areas (Assimilation of Laws) Act, 1951 Hindi Title: अनुसूचित क्षेत्र (विधियों की एकरूपता) अधिनियम, 1951 Long Title: An Act to assimilate certain laws in force in the scheduled areas to the laws in force in the districts of Darrang and Lakhimpur of the State of Assam. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 01-10-1951 Notification: 1st Octber, 1951, vide Notification No. S. R. O. 1461, dated 15th September, 1951, see Gazette of India, Part II, s. 3 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Scheduled Areas (Assimilation of Laws) Act, 1951 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Assimilation of laws. Section 4. Transitional provisions. Section 5. Savings. Section 6. Provision for removal of difficulties. Schedule 1.
